resources.name: be-file-uploader
resources.description: REST API workspace for auth, user, invite, and storage flows. Import into Insomnia and select an environment before sending requests.

data.notes: Set image_file_path to a local image path before calling upload.

resources.name: Public Auth
resources.description: Register, login, and refresh flows. Successful responses automatically persist access and refresh tokens into the active environment.

resources.name: Private User
resources.description: Authenticated user routes. Uses Bearer token from the active environment.

resources.name: Private Invite Admin
resources.description: Requires MANAGE_USERS permission. Invite IDs and generated invite codes are automatically saved back into the environment.

resources.name: Private Storage
resources.description: Authenticated storage routes. Upload saves image metadata to the environment for follow-up list/delete calls.

resources.name: Register
resources.description: Registers a new user by invite code and returns user plus access/refresh tokens.

resources.name: Login
resources.description: Authenticates a user and stores returned tokens in the active environment.

resources.name: Refresh Tokens
resources.description: Rotates the refresh token and persists the new token pair.

resources.name: Get My Profile
resources.description: Returns the authenticated user and updates helper IDs in the environment.

resources.name: Lookup User By ID
resources.description: Attempts user lookup by numeric ID. Current backend implementation is stricter than intended; check docs if this returns 403.

resources.name: List Invites
resources.description: Lists all invites. Saves the first active invite ID and code for quick follow-up testing.

resources.name: Create Invite
resources.description: Creates a new invite code and persists it into invite_code.

resources.name: Revoke Invite
resources.description: Revokes an invite by ID from the active environment.

resources.name: Upload Image
resources.description: Uploads one image from image_file_path. Accepted MIME types: jpeg, png, webp, gif. Max size: 10 MiB.

resources.name: Delete Image
resources.description: Deletes the image referenced by image_id. Current backend implementation is stricter than a typical owner-delete flow; see docs if this returns 403.

resources.name: List My Images
resources.description: Lists the authenticated user's images. Requires VIEW_OWN_FILES.

resources.name: List All Images
List Images By User ID
resources.description: Lists images for image_owner_id. Requires VIEW_OTHER_FILES.
